name: Sign Message Demo
description: Sign an arbitrary message using the connected Safe wallet.

name: ERC20 Transfer Demo
description: Send an ERC20 token transfer via the connected Safe wallet.

name: XMTP Circles Demo
description: Enables XMTP messaging for Safe wallets with native Circles support, allowing users to coordinate and message directly within a secure chat.

name: Coinflip Game
description: A simple coin flip mini app game.

name: MiniApps Org Manager
description: Builder-focused setup tool for miniapp organizations, including org creation, accepted CRC configuration, signer management, and withdrawals.

name: Vendor Offer Setup
description: Complete vendor setup for marketplace: create organisation, deploy payment gateway, configure trust relationships. Prepares vendors to create marketplace offers.

name: Group Join Request
description: Browse Circles groups and request to join by paying 1 CRC. Group owners receive an XMTP notification with your join request.

name: Backer DAO Voting
description: DAO voting for Circles Backers. Create and vote on proposals using CRC. Only verified backers can participate.

name: Pixel Canvas
description: Collaborative pixel art canvas. Purchase pixels for 50 CRC and upload images for 100 CRC. Own a piece of blockchain art!

name: Trust Explorer
description: Explore Circles trust relationships. See who trusts you, who you trust, and discover trust networks across the ecosystem.
